text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family detached ranch style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Vernon Ave, to the South by Washington St, to the East by Veterans Pkwy, and to the West by Towanda Ave.
